allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Total findings: {len\(d\)}'\); [print\(f' [{x[\\"severity\\"]}] {x[\\"antipattern\\"]} | {x[\\"file\\"]} line {x[\\"line\\"]}'\) for x in d]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Total:', len\(d\)\); [print\(f'{x[\\"antipattern\\"]} [{x[\\"severity\\"]}] @ {x[\\"file\\"]}:{x[\\"line\\"]}'\) for x in d]")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); from collections import Counter; c=Counter\(x['antipattern'] for x in d\); print\(f'Total: {len\(d\)} findings across {len\(c\)} patterns\\n'\); [print\(f'  {k}: {v}'\) for k,v in c.most_common\(\)]")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('detect_full.json','utf8'\)\); const c={}; d.forEach\(x=>{c[x.antipattern]=\(c[x.antipattern]||0\)+1}\); console.log\('Total:',d.length\); Object.entries\(c\).sort\(\(a,b\)=>b[1]-a[1]\).forEach\(\([k,v]\)=>console.log\(v+'\\t'+k\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const text=fs.readFileSync\('detect_full.json','utf8'\); const d=JSON.parse\(text\); const c={}; d.forEach\(x=>{c[x.antipattern]=\(c[x.antipattern]||0\)+1}\); console.log\('Total:',d.length\); Object.entries\(c\).sort\(\(a,b\)=>b[1]-a[1]\).forEach\(\([k,v]\)=>console.log\(v+' '+k\)\)")
